title: ACFA Regionale de Calgary
description: acfa.ab.ca zoominfo.com/c/acfa-régionale-de-calgary/354494275 The ACFA (French Canadian Association of Alberta) was founded in 1926 and serves as the official political spokesperson for all French-speaking people in Alberta. Its core mission is to protect francophone linguistic rights, advance French-language education, and strengthen the cultural vitality of Alberta's Francophone communities across 13+ regional branches. The non-profit is headquartered in Edmonton and employs between 11–50 people. It is currently approaching its 100th anniversary, with the board actively planning centennial celebrations
